fixes.desc: Historic ruv→swarm rename sweep ran through base64 data and corrupted accepts@1.3.8's sha512 in the v3 pnpm lock (ERR_PNPM_TARBALL_INTEGRITY). Restored the registry-confirmed hash and audited all 3,012 hashes in both locks against every rename-era token (v1.4.23).

Every generated settings.json shipped a hook on 'SubagentStart' — not a Claude Code event, so it never fired. Caught by the new `swarmdo config lint` on its first run; dead block removed from the generator (v1.4.17).
fixes.marker: "SubagentStart" is NOT a Claude Code hook event

fixes.desc: Standalone `npm i @swarmdo/cli` crashed with ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND because file:../ siblings never shipped. Publishes now stage a self-contained tree with the 7-package closure vendored inside the tarball (v1.4.12).
fixes.marker: stage a self-contained @swarmdo/cli for npm publish

fixes.desc: `swarmdo config lint` (v1.4.6) — static schema/hooks/mcp/layout validation; its first run caught the dead SubagentStart hook. Witnessed in the BUILT artifact so source-only checkouts trip the dist-not-built precondition (#1880) instead of a false regression.
